creator: rs@paket.ua
text:
Good day,


I try start FreeBSD 12.1 in Oracle cloud in PARAVILTUALIZED mode but not works.. 

Works only in EMULATED mode...

--- start FreeBSD 12.1 in Oracle cloud in PARAVILTUALIZED mode:
Rebooting...
cpu_reset: Restarting BSP
cpu_reset_proxy: Stopped CPU 1
Malformed line (6):
        'vfs.root.mountfrom=ufs:/dev/ada0s1a'
Failed to parse config: '/boot/loader.conf'
Loading /boot/loader.conf.local
